'''gongahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:measily|measily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:measily|measily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gongahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongahithi|gongahithi]] || [[word:gongahiji|gongahiji]] || [[word:gongahishi|gongahishi]] || [[word:gongahiki|gongahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongahuthuthu|gongahuthuthu]] || [[word:gongahujuju|gongahujuju]] || [[word:gongahushushu|gongahushushu]] || [[word:gongahukuku|gongahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongahuthu|gongahuthu]] || [[word:gongahuju|gongahuju]] || [[word:gongahushu|gongahushu]] || [[word:gongahuku|gongahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongahufthuf|gongahufthuf]] || [[word:gongahufjuf|gongahufjuf]] || [[word:gongahufshuf|gongahufshuf]] || [[word:gongahufkuf|gongahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongahethe|gongahethe]] || [[word:gongaheje|gongaheje]] || [[word:gongaheshe|gongaheshe]] || [[word:gongaheke|gongaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongahothotho|gongahothotho]] || [[word:gongahojojo|gongahojojo]] || [[word:gongahoshosho|gongahoshosho]] || [[word:gongahokoko|gongahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongahotho|gongahotho]] || [[word:gongahojo|gongahojo]] || [[word:gongahosho|gongahosho]] || [[word:gongahoko|gongahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongahofthof|gongahofthof]] || [[word:gongahofjof|gongahofjof]] || [[word:gongahofshof|gongahofshof]] || [[word:gongahofkof|gongahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongahïfthïf|gongahïfthïf]] || [[word:gongahïfjïf|gongahïfjïf]] || [[word:gongahïfshïf|gongahïfshïf]] || [[word:gongahïfkïf|gongahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongahïfthïfthïf|gongahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gongahïfjïfjïf|gongahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gongahïfshïfshïf|gongahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gongahïfkïfkïf|gongahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongahïfthïf|gongahïfthïf]] || [[word:gongahïfjïf|gongahïfjïf]] || [[word:gongahïfshïf|gongahïfshïf]] || [[word:gongahïfkïf|gongahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongahïfthïf|gongahïfthïf]] || [[word:gongahïfjïf|gongahïfjïf]] || [[word:gongahïfshïf|gongahïfshïf]] || [[word:gongahïfkïf|gongahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongahæthæ|gongahæthæ]] || [[word:gongahæjæ|gongahæjæ]] || [[word:gongahæshæ|gongahæshæ]] || [[word:gongahækæ|gongahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongahathatha|gongahathatha]] || [[word:gongahajaja|gongahajaja]] || [[word:gongahashasha|gongahashasha]] || [[word:gongahakaka|gongahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongahatha|gongahatha]] || [[word:gongahaja|gongahaja]] || [[word:gongahasha|gongahasha]] || [[word:gongahaka|gongahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongahafthaf|gongahafthaf]] || [[word:gongahafjaf|gongahafjaf]] || [[word:gongahafshaf|gongahafshaf]] || [[word:gongahafkaf|gongahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gongahasha|gongahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongahshësha|gongahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongahrosha|gongahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongahmusha|gongahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongahyasha|gongahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongahnkshësha|gogongahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongahnkrosha|gogongahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongahnkmusha|gogongahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongahnkyasha|gogongahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gongangahasha|gongangahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongangahshësha|gongangahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangahrosha|gongangahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangahmusha|gongangahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongangahyasha|gongangahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongangahnkshësha|gogongangahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongangahnkrosha|gogongangahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongangahnkmusha|gogongangahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongangahnkyasha|gogongangahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gengæhasha|gengæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gengæhshësha|gengæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gengæhrosha|gengæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gengæhmusha|gengæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gengæhyasha|gengæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogengæhnkshësha|gogengæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogengæhnkrosha|gogengæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogengæhnkmusha|gogengæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogengæhnkyasha|gogengæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gongfahasha|gongfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongfahshësha|gongfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongfahrosha|gongfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongfahmusha|gongfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongfahyasha|gongfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongfahnkshësha|gogongfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongfahnkrosha|gogongfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongfahnkmusha|gogongfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongfahnkyasha|gogongfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
